{{Infobox concept
| name = Copper
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Copper Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Copper represents the initial stage of the [[sacred arts]] and serves as the foundational step for practitioners. At this level, an individual's spirit opens, allowing them to perceive and harvest the [[vital aura]] present in the natural world. By cycling this energy from the heavens and earth, a Copper can process it into [[madra]] to fuel their own body. This ability provides them with a more expansive and effective supply of power compared to those at lower levels, such as the [[Unsouled]]. While a Copper possesses significant advantages over an [[Unsouled]]—who may struggle to defend themselves against one—they remain quantitatively inferior to those at the [[Iron stage]], who possess superhuman physical capabilities. In terms of progression, most individuals reach the [[Copper stage]] by age thirteen. While some may advance naturally through the refinement of their innate spirit, others may use specific medicines to aid the process. The stage is characterized by a unique sensory experience known as [[Copper sight]], which allows practitioners to see the colors and movements of various types of [[aura]]. Beyond spiritual development, Copper is also a material used in the construction of various objects, ranging from mechanical skeletons and doors to specialized tools and treasures.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kelsa]] is currently a [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Copper]] [[sacred artist]] is a level of power.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Copper]] is considered an average stage by the standards of the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Copper]] is a stage or rank.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Copper serves as a specific stage of progression and advancement that represents a certain level of strength. Within this rank, individuals gain the ability to see [[aura]] and experience enhanced senses. While Copper can also function as a regional form of currency, it is a status held by [[Tash]] and a level reached by [[Lindon]]. Ultimately, [[Lindon]]'s Copper core was transmuted into [[Iron]] as he progressed beyond this stage.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|At the [[Copper stage]], one can see [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|One of [[Lindon]]'s cores has reached the [[Copper stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper]] is a stage of progression.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Copper]] is a type of currency or value in the region.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is [[Copper stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper]] is a level of strength.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper]] is a level of advancement.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper]] is a rank or status held by [[Tash]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's core]] was transmuted from [[Copper]] to [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper]] is a stage of senses for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Copper]] is dead and had reached [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Copper]] is a sense or rank mentioned by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Copper]] stepping into the cave would have their air scorched and skin blackened.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] was once at the [[Copper stage]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Coppers]] are people in the school who might be peeping.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Copper]] is a stage or year of power.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Overlord]] is little better than a [[Copper]] on the scale of [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Coppers]] are individuals who can sweep.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
